design_plan: rng=42; AIDA checked; hero width math ~1120px for 2–3 lines; dense grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense; competitor labels swept; CTA contrast verified (ink on paper); animations guarded if GSAP missing.
headline: Book rides with AI — compare ETAs, coordinate pickups, and reuse your routes

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: An indexable, workflow‑focused use‑case page showing how Super helps people book and coordinate rides with a real computer‑using AI agent. Super compares options, handles pickup details, and gets faster over time by reusing a computer-use cache — positioned clearly against Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Folk, and Orchids.
